TechnologyStack.Runtime: Python backend runtime 3.12 / Node.js frontend toolchain 20.x LTS

dep.name: fastapi
dep.purpose: Async HTTP API framework for public, admin, and agent endpoints.

dep.name: sqlalchemy
dep.purpose: Async ORM and query construction for PostgreSQL access.

dep.name: asyncpg
dep.purpose: Required PostgreSQL driver for async SQLAlchemy connections.

dep.name: alembic
dep.purpose: Schema migrations executed only through the sync CLI.

dep.name: postgresql
dep.purpose: Primary relational database for catalog, merchant prep, and audit records.

dep.name: minio
dep.purpose: Local S3-compatible object storage for product images and thumbnails.

dep.name: aioboto3
dep.purpose: Async S3 client for MinIO integration and presigned URLs.

dep.name: pydantic
dep.purpose: Settings and request/response validation.

dep.name: python-jose
dep.purpose: JWT encoding and decoding for admin and future merchant auth.

dep.name: passlib[bcrypt]
dep.purpose: Password verification for platform admin authentication.

dep.name: Pillow
dep.purpose: Thumbnail generation during image upload.

dep.name: Faker
dep.purpose: Realistic seed data generation for products, attributes, sellers, and offers.

dep.name: vue
dep.purpose: Frontend UI framework for catalog, modal, admin, and agent surfaces.

dep.name: typescript
dep.purpose: Typed frontend implementation and API contracts.

dep.name: vite
dep.purpose: Frontend dev server and build pipeline.

dep.name: vue-router
dep.purpose: Client-side routing for public and admin pages.

dep.name: pinia
dep.purpose: Client-side state management for auth, catalog, and agent state.

dep.name: axios
dep.purpose: HTTP client for backend communication from the frontend.

dep.name: docker-compose
dep.purpose: Local orchestration for PostgreSQL, MinIO, backend, and frontend services.

dep.name: pytest
dep.purpose: Planned backend test runner for async service and API verification.

dep.name: pytest-asyncio
dep.purpose: Planned async backend test support.

dep.name: httpx
dep.purpose: Planned async API client for FastAPI endpoint verification.

dep.name: vitest
dep.purpose: Planned frontend test runner for FSD slices and widgets.

dep.name: @vue/test-utils
dep.purpose: Planned Vue component testing utilities.

constraint.reason: Keep handler and dependency APIs aligned with the requested surface.
Async session usage and query APIs must match SQLAlchemy 2.x.
Async PostgreSQL access is allowed only through asyncpg; psycopg2 is forbidden in runtime code.
Migration scripts target the 1.14 CLI behavior only.
Handlers must use async S3 calls; sync boto3 in request paths is forbidden.
Frontend composition API and FSD implementation assume Vue 3.5 behavior.
Frontend local development and Docker command are defined against Vite 6.
Cross-slice imports are forbidden; all inter-slice access must go through index.ts.

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic checks around repositories, services, parsers, and isolated frontend slices.

wave-level.command: pytest tests/integration -q && vitest run src/widgets src/pages
wave-level.focus: Validate only the merged API surfaces, data flows, and frontend widgets touched by the current wave.

phase-level.command: pytest -q && vitest run && docker compose up --build
phase-level.focus: Broader integration and regression confidence across infra, backend, frontend, and agent discovery surfaces.

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer Faker-backed fixtures, HTTPX async clients, aioboto3 stubs, and narrow Vue component doubles over broad monkey-patching.

Observability.logger: Python logging with stable structured fields, Uvicorn access logs, and frontend diagnostics aligned to the same block-anchor convention.
Observability.required-fields: correlationId, requestId, actorType, actorId, merchantId, endpoint, module, block
Observability.redaction: Never log secrets, credentials, JWTs, presigned URLs with secrets, or raw high-risk payloads.

DeliveryShape.shape: Local Docker Compose stack with PostgreSQL 16, MinIO, FastAPI backend on port 8000, and Vite frontend on port 5173 using bind mounts for hot reload.
Backend owns shared GRACE artifacts in kodex-backend/docs while frontend and infra keep repo-local AI workflow logs.
Phase 1 ships a graded prototype while preserving schema and module seams for Phase 2 merchant, RBAC, search, and agent-audit expansion.
